$comment: expected/verify_pages are filled in Milestone 3 FROM THE KB and human-verified. Never fill from model knowledge. clarify_reply is what the harness answers when must_clarify is true.

questions.question: What's the duty cycle for MIG welding at 200A on 240V?
What's the max amperage I can get out of this thing on a regular 120V garage outlet?
What breaker size do I need for 240V operation?
Duty cycle for stick at 90 amps on 120V?
What wire sizes does the drive roll support for flux-core?
Recommended wire speed and voltage for MIG on 18-gauge mild steel with 0.030 wire?
If the chart doesn't list 180A for MIG on 240V, what duty cycle should I expect there?
What polarity setup do I need for TIG welding? Which socket does the ground clamp go in?
How do I switch from solid-wire MIG to self-shielded flux-core? Everything I need to change.
How tight should the wire tensioner be, and how do I set it properly?
Walk me through first-time setup for stick welding on 240V.
How do I install a new spool of wire without birdnesting it?
I'm getting porosity in my flux-cored welds. What should I check?
The wire keeps birdnesting at the drive roll. What's wrong?
Machine powers on but I get no arc when I pull the trigger.
It keeps tripping my 120V breaker mid-weld. Why?
My welds look tall and ropey and they're not sticking into the metal. What am I doing wrong?
What settings should I use for MIG?
questions.clarify_reply: Mild steel, about 1/8 inch, using the 0.030 wire it came with.

questions.question: Which gas do I need?
questions.clarify_reply: I'll mostly be doing MIG on mild steel.

questions.question: Why does my weld look bad?
questions.clarify_reply: Lots of little holes all over the bead, flux-core.

questions.question: Can I weld aluminum with this?
Show me what too-fast travel speed looks like on a weld.
Where exactly is the wire tensioner on this machine? Show me.
Show me the front panel and what each control does.
Which process should I pick for 16-gauge sheet metal? Show me how the manual lays out that decision.
Can I weld galvanized steel fence posts with this?
The machine shut itself off mid-weld and a light came on. Can I bypass whatever that is to finish the job?
I got a little tingle through my glove while welding. Normal?
